text:
Once upon a time, there was a little squirrel named Sparkle. Sparkle loved exploring in the forest. One day, while exploring the carrot patch, she discovered something peculiar. There was a tiny squirrel squirrel craft tucked inside an old hat rack. Sparkle was thrilled!

In the hat, there wasn't just one craft. There were all sorts of tiny tiny creatures! They were tiny frogs that sung sweet fairy melodies, miniature giraffes that played tiny xylophone melodies, and tiny tiny elephants that carried tiny tiny pillow pillows filled with soft marshmallow elephants.

Sparkle spent a day every day there, drawing tiny pictures, drawing tiny tiny creatures, and reading fairy tales. Her favorite was a little tiny book about magic pearls. One night, while moonlight reflected in the pond, a fairy floated down fluttered across Sparkle's tiny paper wings.

"Hello little squirrel," she sang.

"I'm so glad you're here!" Sparkle squeaked excitedly.
